theme_name: Sunday Funday Finals — World Cup Semifinal Hype
theme_tagline: The semifinals are set. England vs Argentina. Who's ready?
primary_hook: FIFA World Cup 2026 — England vs Argentina confirmed for Wednesday (July 15, 3PM ET) at Atlanta. One of the greatest rivalries in soccer history is back on the biggest stage.
secondary_hook: Sunday rest day between quarterfinals and semis — the calm before the storm. World Cup Final is July 19 at MetLife Stadium. Global buzz at peak levels.
trending_topic_details: England defeated Norway 2-1 in extra time (Jude Bellingham brace). Argentina defeated ten-man Switzerland 3-1 in extra time (Julian Alvarez decisive goal). Both teams are through to the semifinals. England vs Argentina — first WC meeting since 2002. Viral track: 'Dai Dai' by Shakira & Burna Boy is the unofficial WC anthem with 5.3M+ posts on TikTok. Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey generating major buzz opening July 17.
content_angle: Lady E Luck channels World Cup semifinal energy — the stakes are high, the buzz is electric, and big wins happen when you show up. Just like England and Argentina on the pitch, our players come to WIN.
deals_hook: Golden Boot Jackpot — biggest recharge of the day wins a multiplier bonus
Hat Trick Bonus — 3 recharges = stacked bonus (match day energy)
Penalty Kick Free Spin — share referral code = both players get a free spin bonus
Halftime Reload — mystery midnight drop for all active players
avoid: picking a winner between England and Argentina (stay neutral, celebrate both)
